sigWerErrors.reason: Omitting 'este' ('this') slightly changes the flow but does not significantly alter the meaning of the sentence in this context.
The difference between 'si' (if) and 'sí' (yes) is only an accent mark; in this context, both are understood as 'sí' (affirmation), so the meaning is preserved.
